flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chattahoochee Technical College fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (22.3% → 17.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Chattahoochee Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.2k → $3.5k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Chattahoochee Technical College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (57.4% → 67.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Chattahoochee Technical College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 (7.6k → 8.7k).
